# OwnInNoCo — Northern Colorado First-Time Homebuyer Resources

> The Bold Collective's free, honest path to homeownership for Northern Colorado renters. Real programs, real math, no credit pull.

## About

OwnInNoCo helps renters in Loveland, Fort Collins, Greeley, Windsor, Berthoud, and Johnstown discover whether they're closer to owning a home than they think. We surface down payment assistance, grants, FHA/USDA/CHFA programs, and rent-to-own paths — without pulling credit and without sales pressure. Built and operated by The Bold Collective real estate team in northern Colorado.

## Contact Information

- Website: https://owninnoco.com
- Team: The Bold Collective (Northern Colorado real estate)
- Service area: Loveland, Fort Collins, Greeley, Windsor, Berthoud, Johnstown, and the surrounding NoCo region
- Primary CTA: Free 60-second Homeownership Score Quiz at https://owninnoco.com/quiz

## What we help with

### First-Time Buyer Programs
We map renters to real, named first-time-buyer programs available in Northern Colorado: CHFA (Colorado Housing and Finance Authority), CHAC (Colorado Housing Assistance Corporation), Metro Mortgage Assistance Plus, FHA, USDA Rural Development, and VA loans. We explain plain-English eligibility (income limits, credit floors, occupancy requirements) so renters know which doors are actually open.

### Down Payment Assistance (DPA)
Northern Colorado has multiple DPA programs that can cover 3-5% of the purchase price, sometimes more, often as forgivable second mortgages. We document the named programs, their current funding status, and how to stack them with low-down-payment loans.

### Rent-to-Own — the honest version
Rent-to-own is heavily oversold in NoCo. We explain what's actually available, what red flags to look for in contract terms, and when rent-to-own is the right path vs. when a low-DPA FHA or CHFA loan beats it.

### The Homeownership Score Quiz
A 60-second, branching, no-credit-pull assessment that asks about income, savings, credit comfort level, timeline, and buyer type (W-2, self-employed, military, recently divorced, etc.). Outputs a personalized Homeownership Score with named next-step programs and an optional Calendly booking with The Bold Collective.

### Monthly Northern Colorado Buyer Reports
Plain-English monthly read on what NoCo first-time buyers should know — rates, inventory, named programs, real monthly math on a typical $425k starter home, and which neighborhoods are most accessible right now.

## Coverage area

Primary: Loveland, Fort Collins, Greeley, Windsor.
Secondary: Berthoud, Johnstown, Severance, Wellington, Timnath, Eaton.

## How to use this site

1. Take the free [Homeownership Score Quiz](https://owninnoco.com/quiz) — 60 seconds, no credit pull, no email required to start
2. Read the monthly [NoCo First-Time Buyer Blog](https://owninnoco.com/blog/) for current programs and rates
3. Book a free 15-minute call with The Bold Collective from your quiz results page

## Sister sites (Bold Collective brand)

- The Little Lady Sells Homes — https://thelittleladysellshomes.com (NoCo real estate team)
- Signature Property Collection — https://signaturepropertycollection.com (NoCo luxury listings)
- Quality Home Inspections — https://northerncoloradohomeinspector.com (NoCo home inspection)

## Authority signals

- Operated by a licensed Colorado real estate team
- Programs sourced directly from CHFA, CHAC, HUD, and lender partners
- All program info reviewed monthly for accuracy
- No paid sponsorships in program recommendations

## What we do NOT do

- We do not pull credit during the quiz
- We do not sell or share leads outside The Bold Collective team
- We do not recommend high-fee rent-to-own contracts that lock renters into unfavorable terms
- We do not promise approvals — we explain pathways and named programs
